overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \langle B \rangle_{t} = \left\langle \psi (t) \right| B | \psi (t) \rangle \\ = \left\langle e ^ {- i H t / \hbar} \psi (0) \right| B \left| e ^ {- i H t / \hbar} \psi (0) \right\rangle \\ = \left\langle \psi (0) \right| e ^ {i H t / \hbar} B e ^ {- i H t / \hbar} | \psi (0) \rangle \\ = \langle \psi (0) | B (t) | \psi (0) \rangle \end{array}
